basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess B.E / B.Tech in Civil Engineering, M.E / M.Tech in Soil Mechanics and Foundation Engineering / Geotechnical Engineering / Construction Engineering and Management / Structural Engineering / Transportation Engineering / closely related specializations, or Ph.D qualification are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant vacancies. The offline application p

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech in Civil Engineering, M.E / M.Tech, Ph.D.
qualification.details: B.E / B.Tech in Civil Engineering (or) M.E / M.Tech in Soil Mechanics and Foundation Engineering / Geotechnical Engineering / Construction Engineering and Management / Structural Engineering / Transportation Engineering / any other closely relevant degree specializations (or) Higher degree (Ph.D.)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E / B.Tech in Civil Engineering, or an M.E / M.Tech in specific specializations like Soil Mechanics and Foundation Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering, etc., or a Ph.D. to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Assistant recruitment at Anna University. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at Anna University involves an Offline Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Assistant. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the Anna University official website. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at Anna University is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.
